ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group classification (e.g., oxygenated, aromatic) */,
  "hap" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chemical is a hazardous air pollutant */,
  "speciate_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the speciation data */,
  "o_c" REAL /* Ratio of oxygen to carbon */,
  "log_c" REAL /* Logarithmic concentration value */,
  "soa_yield" REAL /* Yield of secondary organic aerosol */,
  "mir" REAL /* Maximum Incremental Reactivity value */,
  "emissions_per_person" REAL /* Emissions in kg per person per year */,
  "percent_emissions" REAL /* Percentage of total emissions */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the chemical */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the chemical */,
  "boiling_point" REAL /* Boiling point of the chemical */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the chemical */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the chemical */,
  "toxicity_description" TEXT /* Description of the toxicity of the chemical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., manufacturing, vehicle) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the source */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Type of industry associated with the source */,
  "emission_capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity for emissions (in tons/year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical associated with this data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission source */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Value of emissions recorded */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the emission data */,
  "sampling_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of sampling (e.g., hourly, daily, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES emission_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for compliance record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission source */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Name of the regulation being tracked */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  "audit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of audits (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES emission_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speciation_data" (
  "speciate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the speciation record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical for which this speciation applies */,
  "speciation_method" TEXT /* Method used for speciation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the speciation process */,
  "speciation_date" TEXT /* Date of speciation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speciate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speciation_data_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for secure storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address, physical location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical associated with this trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "total_emissions" REAL /* Total emissions for that year */,
  "average_emission_rate" REAL /* Average rate of emissions for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_trends_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_data" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission source */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the emission source */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the emission source */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the emission source */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the emission source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES emission_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical related to the impact */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental impact */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the impact (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_species" TEXT /* List of species affected by the chemical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impact_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical being studied */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the study was published */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Key findings from the study */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_studies_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_control_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control measure */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission source to which the measure applies */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the control measure */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control measure */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date the measure was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_control_measures_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES emission_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality standard */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical to which the standard applies */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Value of the air quality standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of the standard (e.g., annual average, peak) */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body that set the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_standards_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_modeling" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission model */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical being modeled */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_modeling_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)
